mapper.select:
SELECT r.ROOM_TYPE_ID AS room_type_id, r.FK_HOTEL_ID AS brand_id, h.HOTEL_NAME AS hotel_name, r.ROOM_GRADE AS room_grade, r.BED_TYPE AS bed_type, r.VIEW_TYPE AS view_type, r.ROOM_NAME AS room_name, r.ROOM_SIZE AS room_size, r.MAX_CAPACITY AS max_capacity, r.TOTAL_COUNT AS total_count, r.BASE_PRICE AS base_price, r.APPROVE_STATUS AS approve_status, i.IMAGE_URL AS image_url
FROM ROOM_TYPE r
JOIN TBL_HOTEL h ON r.FK_HOTEL_ID = h.HOTEL_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM_IMAGE i ON r.ROOM_TYPE_ID = i.ROOM_TYPE_ID AND i.IS_MAIN = 'Y'
WHERE r.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND h.ADMIN_NO = #{adminNo} ORDER BY r.ROOM_NAME
mapper.update:
UPDATE room_type SET room_name = #{room_name}, room_grade = #{room_grade}, bed_type = #{bed_type}, view_type = #{view_type}, base_price = #{base_price}, total_count = #{total_count}
WHERE room_type_id = #{roomTypeId}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.ROOM_TYPE_ID AS room_type_id, r.FK_HOTEL_ID AS brand_id, h.HOTEL_NAME AS hotel_name, r.ROOM_GRADE AS room_grade, r.BED_TYPE AS bed_type, r.VIEW_TYPE AS view_type, r.ROOM_NAME AS room_name, r.ROOM_SIZE AS room_size, r.MAX_CAPACITY AS max_capacity, r.TOTAL_COUNT AS total_count, r.BASE_PRICE AS base_price, r.APPROVE_STATUS AS approve_status, i.IMAGE_URL AS image_url
FROM ROOM_TYPE r
JOIN TBL_HOTEL h ON r.FK_HOTEL_ID = h.HOTEL_ID
LEFT JOIN ROOM_IMAGE i ON r.ROOM_TYPE_ID = i.ROOM_TYPE_ID AND i.IS_MAIN = 'Y'
WHERE r.IS_ACTIVE = 'N' AND h.ADMIN_NO = #{adminNo}
ORDER BY r.ROOM_NAME
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_room_type.currval FROM dual
INSERT INTO room_type ( room_type_id, fk_hotel_id, room_name, room_grade, room_size, bed_type, view_type, base_price, max_capacity, total_count, approve_status ) VALUES ( seq_room_type.nextval,
(SELECT hotel_id FROM tbl_hotel WHERE admin_no = #{admin_no}),
#{room_name}, #{room_grade}, #{room_size}, #{bed_type}, #{view_type}, #{base_price}, #{max_capacity}, #{total_count},
#{approve_status} )
INSERT INTO ROOM_IMAGE ( IMAGE_ID, ROOM_TYPE_ID, IMAGE_URL, IS_MAIN, SORT_ORDER ) VALUES ( SEQ_ROOM_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{fk_room_type_id}, #{image_url}, 'Y', 1 )

INSERT INTO ROOM_STOCK ( stock_id, room_type_id, stay_date, available_count, is_closed, min_stay )
SELECT SEQ_ROOM_STOCK.NEXTVAL, #{roomTypeId}, TRUNC(SYSDATE) + (LEVEL - 1), (SELECT total_count FROM ROOM_TYPE WHERE room_type_id = #{roomTypeId}), 'N', 1
FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 365
mapper.update: UPDATE ROOM_TYPE SET ROOM_NAME = #{room_name}, ROOM_GRADE = #{room_grade}, BED_TYPE = #{bed_type}, VIEW_TYPE = #{view_type}, BASE_PRICE = #{base_price}, TOTAL_COUNT = #{total_count} WHERE ROOM_TYPE_ID = #{roomTypeId}
mapper.select:
SELECT h.FK_ROOM_TYPE_ID AS room_type_id, rt.ROOM_NAME AS room_name, ho.HOTEL_NAME AS hotel_name, h.STATUS AS status, h.REASON AS reason, h.DECIDED_BY AS decided_by, h.DECIDED_AT AS decided_at
FROM ROOM_APPROVAL_HISTORY h
JOIN ROOM_TYPE rt ON h.FK_ROOM_TYPE_ID = rt.ROOM_TYPE_ID
JOIN TBL_HOTEL ho ON rt.FK_HOTEL_ID = ho.HOTEL_ID
WHERE ho.ADMIN_NO = #{adminNo}
ORDER BY h.DECIDED_AT DESC

SELECT rt.room_type_id, rt.room_name, rt.room_grade, rt.bed_type, rt.view_type, rt.base_price, rt.max_capacity, rt.approve_status, h.hotel_name FROM room_type rt JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id ORDER BY rt.room_type_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROOM_APPROVAL_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, FK_ROOM_TYPE_ID, STATUS, REASON, DECIDED_BY, DECIDED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_ROOM_APPROVAL_HISTORY.NEXTVAL, #{room_type_id}, #{status}, #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admin_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT h.STATUS AS status, h.REASON AS reason, h.DECIDED_BY AS decided_by, h.DECIDED_AT AS decided_at FROM ROOM_APPROVAL_HISTORY h WHERE h.FK_ROOM_TYPE_ID = #{roomTypeId} ORDER BY h.DECIDED_AT DESC

SELECT h.FK_ROOM_TYPE_ID AS room_type_id, rt.ROOM_NAME AS room_name, ho.HOTEL_NAME AS hotel_name, h.STATUS AS status, h.REASON AS reason, h.DECIDED_BY AS decided_by, h.DECIDED_AT AS decided_at
FROM ROOM_APPROVAL_HISTORY h
JOIN ROOM_TYPE rt ON h.FK_ROOM_TYPE_ID = rt.ROOM_TYPE_ID
JOIN TBL_HOTEL ho ON rt.FK_HOTEL_ID = ho.HOTEL_ID
ORDER BY h.DECIDED_AT DESC
